name: Cutting Board
description: Detect edits in the timeline, rate them, and store structured data for model training
author: Trevor May

commands.name: Start Capture
commands.description: Begin polling the timeline for edit detection

commands.name: Stop Capture
commands.description: Stop polling and show session stats

commands.name: Name Session
commands.description: Set a user-friendly name on a completed session

commands.name: Unnamed Sessions
commands.description: List ended sessions that have no name yet

commands.name: Train Model
commands.description: Retrain the autocut model from collected edit data

commands.name: Scan Autocut
commands.description: Scan all clips and return planned edits for confirmation

commands.name: Execute Autocut
commands.description: Duplicate sequence and execute all planned edits
